LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SWINERTON BUILDERS'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT CONFIRMED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $680,672 CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF FIRST FILING A $10,000 BOND. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM IN THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $680,627 BASED ON DEFENDANT'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND DEDUCTING $25,000 FOR DEFENDANT'S VAGUELY ASSERTED AND INSUFFICIENTLY SUPPORTED DAMAGES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FILIPINO CULTURAL CENTER, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT CONFIRMED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED AND ITS DEMURRER TO THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS PREMATURE BECAUSE THE ALTER EGO THEORY IS ALLEGED AGAINST DOES 41-140 AND THOSE DOE DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT BEEN NAMED. ADDITIONALLY, SFFCC LACKS STANDING TO DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT ALLEGED AGAINST IT. THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT SPECIFICALLY PLED AND PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO CORRECT THIS DEFICIENCY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489.
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-25-2016 - NOT HELD AND REMOVED. DISMISSAL ON FILE. (0.5)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Set For Trial On Nov-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Appearances: Alexander Bannon of Oles Morrison telephone number 510-903-2001 for Plaintiff.
Victor Marquez of The Marquez Law Group telephone number 415-314-7831 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SWINERTON BUILDERS'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
is granted in the amount of $680,672 conditioned on plaintiff first filing a $10,000 bond. Plaintiff has shown the probable validity of its claim in the principal sum of $680,627 based on defendant's discovery responses and deducting $25,000 for defendant's vaguely asserted and insufficiently supported damages. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexander Bannon of Oles Morrison telephone number 510-903-2001 for Plaintiff.
Victor Marquez of The Marquez Law Group telephone number 415-314-7831 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FILIPINO CULTURAL CENTER, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -
Defendant's demurrer to the second cause of action is overruled and its demurrer to the fifth cause of action is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. The demurrer to the second cause of action is premature because the alter ego theory is alleged against Does 41-140 and those Doe defendants have not been named. Additionally, SFFCC lacks standing to demurrer to the second cause of action because the second cause of action is not alleged against it. The fifth cause of action is not specifically pled and plaintiff is given an opportunity to correct this deficiency. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against San Francisco Filipino Cultural Center, Llc And Its Counsel, Victor Marquez
Off Calendar Aug-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alexander Bannon, of Oles Morrison Rinker & Baker LLP, Tel. 510.903.2001, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Victor M. Marquez, of The Marquez Law Group, Tel. 415.314.7831, for defendants.

RULING: A R G U E D. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF SWINERTON BUILDERS' Motion To Compel Further Answers To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions Against San Francisco Filipino Cultural Center, LLC And Its Counsel, Victor Marquez is denied. Plaintiff is entitled to $2,000. in sanctions against defendant and its counsel that is payable within 90 days of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
